parameters.query: SELECT id, title, dept, status, value, pwin, score, due_date, qualified_at, naics, set_aside, solicitation_number, program_office, incumbent, created_at, updated_at FROM gda_opportunities WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, type, url, publisher, published_at, snippet, relevance_reason FROM gda_opportunity_sources WHERE opportunity_id = $1 ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT summary, why_it_matters, recommendation, confidence, ooda_json, last_analyzed_at FROM gda_opportunity_analysis WHERE opportunity_id = $1 ORDER BY last_analyzed_at DESC LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, workflow: 'opportunity-detail-v1', action: 'get_opportunity_detail', dryRun: false, data: null, meta: { generated_at: new Date().toISOString() }, error: { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'Opportunity not found: ' + $('Extract ID').first().json.id } }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ target: $('Assemble OODA').first().json.opp.title || $('Extract ID').first().json.id, target_type: 'program', session_id: 'opp_' + $('Extract ID').first().json.id + '_' + Date.now() }) }}

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Extract ID').first().json.id,
  String($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.summary || '').substring(0,2000),
  null,
  String($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.decide_recommendation || 'review').toLowerCase(),
  Number($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.confidence_score || 0) / 100,
  JSON.stringify({ observe: { summary: String($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.observe_summary || ''), facts: ($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.observe_key_signals || []).map(function(s){return{text:s,source_backed:false,interpretation:true};}), gaps: [], coverage_note: 'partial' }, orient: { summary: String($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.orient_threat || ''), context: [], risks: [], coverage_note: 'partial' }, decide: { summary: ($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.decide_rationale || []).join('. '), recommendation: String($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.decide_recommendation || 'watch').toLowerCase(), priority: 'medium', rationale: ($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.decide_rationale || []).map(function(r){return{text:r,source_backed:false,interpretation:true};}), coverage_note: 'partial' }, act: { summary: '', next_steps: ($('Call OODA Workflow').first().json.act_immediate || []).map(function(s){return{step:s,urgency:'immediate'};}), owner_suggestions: [], coverage_note: 'partial' } })
] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_analysis (opportunity_id, summary, why_it_matters, recommendation, confidence, ooda_json, last_analyzed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (opportunity_id) DO UPDATE SET summary = EXCLUDED.summary, recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, ooda_json = EXCLUDED.ooda_json, last_analyzed_at = NOW()
